text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Early one morning, I'm heading to the training
track for an errand and find that it's currently
under maintenance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clank, clank, clank, clank, clank! Hisssss!

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Did it break?! The leveler stopped working
all of a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Huh? They're still working on the track? I wonder
if something happened.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the delay! Our leveler malfunctioned,
but we're going to fix it up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: No worries! ♪ We can wait!

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper B
text_block_list.text: Wouldn't it be faster to call a mechanic?

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper A
text_block_list.text:
It's the morning rush hour right now. There's no
telling when they can get here.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper B
text_block_list.text:
But there's no guarantee we'll be able to fix this
thing on our own!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
No need to rush! There's plenty of time before
school starts! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Just take a deep breath and take things one at a
time!

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper B
text_block_list.text:
You're right. We'll need to get the leveler out of
the way first, then continue smoothing out the
ground...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'll help! You want this thing off the track, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Or would it be better if I give you a hand with the
leveling?

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper A
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to do anything! We appreciate
the thought, but we couldn't possibly make a
student do all that...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's all right if I give 'em a hand, right? What
do you think I should help with?
choice_data_list: Can you move the leveler out of the way?
Help level the track by running around it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: On it, boss! Okay, time to puuuush!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set a steel plate under the leveler so it
doesn't mess up the ground. Then, Hishi Akebono
pushes it with all her might!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Nnnngh! It's so heavy! Just... a little... more!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Phew! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono pushes the leveler off the track,
and the workers manage to finish up maintenance
on schedule.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Sounds good! I'll be done before you know it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono runs along the track carrying the
harrow the workers removed from the leveler. Her
laps leaves the dirt behind her nice and smooth.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeper B
text_block_list.text:
Wow! She's so fast! I think she might be faster
than the leveler itself!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's all smoothed out! ☆ What a relief! I'm glad
everything got done before any other students
arrived! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Hishi Akebono was running, the mechanics
managed to fix the leveler and return it to the
garage. Thus, maintenance was safely completed.
